response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience across multiple domains and languages, there is minimal evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 15+ years, and no demonstrable experience with industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, REST APIs in an industrial context, or secure development lifecycle practices critical to the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse technologies and architectures
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across embedded, web, and cloud environments
concerns: Lack of recent C++ or STL development experience as required for the role
No demonstrated exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, etc.)
Absence of documented work with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
